_description: New Customer Welcome Kit — offer defaults, component list, messaging templates

first_visit_discount.exclude: Cannot be combined with other offers

what_to_expect_bullets: A thorough multi-point inspection with every service — no charge.
A written estimate before any work begins. No surprise charges.
Text or call updates when your vehicle is ready.
A 12-month / 12,000-mile warranty on parts and labor (where applicable).
Transparent pricing — we'll show you the parts we used.

tone_guidelines.voice: Warm, local, trustworthy — like a neighbor who happens to know cars.

letter_structure: Thank them for choosing the shop
One sentence on what makes the shop different
Close with invitation to call anytime
Sign-off with shop name and phone

follow_up_timing.message: Check in, ask if everything is running well, remind them of the referral offer
